testcase.name: shouldThrowIllegalArgumentExceptionWhenUrlIsInvalid
testcase.system-err: [main] WARN jsanca.katabasis.core.internal.util.FileNameResolver - Invalid download URL: ht!tp://bad url java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Illegal character in scheme name at
